T0500.definition: A cryptocurrency wallet where private keys are stored entirely offline without internet connectivity, providing the highest level of security.
T0500.description: Cold wallets prevent remote hacking through physical air-gapping. Common forms include hardware wallets (dedicated devices) and paper wallets (printed private keys). They are ideal for long-term storage of large assets but offer less convenience and require protection against physical theft, device damage, and supply chain attacks.
T0500.usageExample: An institution stores 90% of its crypto assets in a hardware cold wallet, keeping only 10% in a hot wallet for daily transactions.
